AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein urban child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: Born and raised in one of the Wolfein megacities, [PAWN_nameDef] received a quality education and grew up with hopeful dreams for the future.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein rural child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_pronoun] childhood in the countryside. Like many other rural Wolfein children, it was a time filled with joy and fulfillment.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein orphan
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s parents passed away in a tragic accident during her early childhood. The catastrophe left a deep, lasting scar on her heart, but it also forged a stronger, more resolute will within her.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein tractable child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s family wasn't well-off, so she matured early. From a young age, she often helped with household chores within her ability. In front of others, [PAWN_nameDef] always came across as especially well-behaved and considerate.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein naughty child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a mischievous child from an early age. Her energetic and restless nature often caused trouble for those around her. It didn’t take long before she became the ringleader among the neighborhood kids — much to the dismay of the adults.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein ordinary child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into an average middle-class family, and her childhood was as ordinary as that of most of her peers. Yet deep down, she longed for a future filled with a unique adventure all her own.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein unlucky child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s childhood was far from smooth—minor misfortunes seemed to follow her wherever she went. Yet, when it came to major events, she always seemed incredibly lucky, narrowly escaping trouble time and again. Even her parents couldn't quite make sense of it.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein autistic child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: Since childhood, [PAWN_nameDef] has been afraid of interacting with others and reluctant to engage with the outside world. She finds greater comfort and peace in solitude than in the noise of social life.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein timid child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is extremely timid— even the slightest noise can startle her. Her anxious and easily frightened nature has often brought complications into her daily life.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein diligent child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a deep love for the feeling of gaining new knowledge, spending nearly all her time immersed in study. Her favorite place to be is the local library near her home, where she can lose herself for hours on end.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein top student
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is highly motivated when it comes to her studies. Her diligence has earned the admiration of adults. At school, she excels academically and maintains strong, positive relationships with her peers.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein lazy child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is quite lazy by nature. She dislikes going out or exercising, preferring instead to spend her days at home playing games and reading comics. Her grades at school are mediocre at best, much to the frustration of her parents.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein genius
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: From a young age, [PAWN_nameDef] demonstrated intelligence far beyond her peers, showing exceptional talent across multiple fields. However, her naturally frail body made it difficult for her to take part in physical activities or play with other children her age.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein left-behind child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s parents left when she was still very young due to work-related reasons, and she spent her childhood in the care of her grandparents. Her memories of her parents are faint, yet she has always quietly longed for the day she might see them again.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein overseas student
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] received her education in a nation governed by another racial faction. Growing up in a diverse and multicultural environment broadened her perspective far beyond that of most others.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein lonely child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has always been somewhat reclusive since childhood. For reasons unknown, people around her seemed to keep their distance, intentionally or not. But [PAWN_nameDef] never minded—she found greater comfort in solitude than in company.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein poor child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s family lived in deep poverty, and her childhood was marked by hardship. Her parents worked late into the night every day, leaving [PAWN_nameDef] to take care of herself. As a result, she matured far earlier than most children her age.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein little painter
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: From an early age, [PAWN_nameDef] showed an exceptional talent for the arts, with a deep passion for drawing. She often spent her class time sketching in secret, which led to her falling behind academically.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein little athlete
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a strong passion for sports. She joined the school’s track and field club and actively took part in numerous athletic competitions. Her exceptional physical abilities earned her many awards and widespread recognition.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein little chef
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has always had a strong interest in cooking. She not only enjoys good food but also finds great satisfaction in preparing it herself. [PAWN_nameDef] dreams of becoming an outstanding chef in the future.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein little artisan
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] enjoys tinkering with small machines and crafting various handmade items. Her creations are always clever and full of personality, and her friends absolutely adore the handcrafted gifts she makes for them.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein little artisan
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s family runs a restaurant, and in her spare time, she helps out with tasks she can manage. The customers are fond of this hardworking girl and often give her small tips as pocket money, which always brings her great joy.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein little gardener
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a deep love for nature. Her favorite pastime is visiting the botanical garden near her home. There, she learned some basic gardening skills and began growing a few charming little plants at home.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein little gardener
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has loved music since childhood. After learning some basic music theory, she often played simple instruments with friends from the school music club, losing herself in the joyful world of melodies and rhythm.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein little bully
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: Due to a lack of proper guidance at home, [PAWN_nameDef] developed a habit of bullying her peers from a young age. She often took other children's snacks and toys for herself, much to the frustration of both her teachers and parents.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein friend of animals
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has always had a deep affection for animals. She pleaded with her parents many times to let her keep a pet at home, but due to financial or living conditions, her wish never came true. Still, [PAWN_nameDef] hopes that one day, when she's grown up, she can have a few animals to keep her company.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein kind child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a kind and gentle child. Whenever her friends are in trouble, she’s always the first to offer help. Her warm and sincere nature gradually won the hearts of those around her, and she began making more and more friends.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein richer child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] comes from a very wealthy family, living a life of comfort and abundance. All household chores are taken care of by the servants, and for [PAWN_nameDef], life is simply about enjoying its luxuries.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein scout
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] had always been fascinated by the idea of joining the scouts. One day, by a stroke of luck, her wish came true. During her time with the scouts, [PAWN_nameDef] learned many useful survival skills, such as foraging for food in the wild, setting up camp, and identifying different types of plants.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein institutional child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was abandoned by her parents at a very young age. She grew up in an orphanage, surrounded by children who shared the same fate. [PAWN_nameDef] never understood why her parents left her, and this lingering question left her feeling lost and uncertain about the future.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein underachiever
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] consistently ranked near the bottom of her class. She was playful and often avoided her studies, even skipping classes from time to time. Her teachers were deeply disappointed in her, but [PAWN_nameDef] didn’t seem to care. She remained indifferent, lost in her own world with no intention of changing.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein brave child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has shown remarkable courage from a young age. Her character dictates that she will never stand idly by in the face of injustice. Whenever someone close to her is being bullied, [PAWN_nameDef] always steps up, even when facing opponents far stronger than herself.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein doormat
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: Due to [PAWN_nameDef]’s introverted nature, she was often ostracized and bullied at school, with even the teachers choosing to ignore her struggles. These experiences left a deep psychological scar on [PAWN_nameDef], affecting her trust in others and the world around her.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein dangerous child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has shown antisocial tendencies from a young age, having been in and out of prison several times at an early age. Whether inside or outside of prison, [PAWN_nameDef] prefers to communicate through force rather than words.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Evil child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has displayed a natural inclination towards rebellion and malice from a young age, as if entirely opposed to kindness. Her actions are ruthless and selfish, showing no mercy towards others.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Strange child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] never cries, and never smiles. She seems to lack certain emotions, as if living purely on instinct. Some teachers once suspected she had an emotional disorder—but no one dared to look into it too deeply.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Flame-Obsessed child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is fascinated by fire. She repeatedly sets paper on fire, plays with lighters, and even tries to create explosions in the kitchen. She often says, “When it burns, everything is cleansed.”

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Nervous child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] became separated from her family in the underground market. That hours-long experience of being lost still leaves her feeling uneasy in crowds to this day.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Chaos-Making child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born with an intense desire for control, particularly over others’ emotions. Sometimes, she deliberately incites panic in front of others—then calmly sits back and watches as everything spirals out of control.
